name: check_availability
description: Check real availability, the best-fit room, the nightly rate, the number of nights, and the total for a property over specific dates. Use this in the Frictionless Checkout phase before quoting any total. The agent must read the returned rate, nights, and total back verbatim — never estimate them.

property_id.description: The property identifier returned by search_properties, e.g. 'enchantment-resort', 'lauberge-sedona', 'mii-amo'.

returns.description: Availability plus room/rate/nights/total and a payload that navigates the site to the property page with the room pre-selected. No inline card is rendered for availability. Expected shape:
